title: Code AGI is Functional AGI (And It's Here)

mentions.quoted_text: The first ingredient, knowledge and pre-training, is what fueled the original ChatGPT moment in 2022.
mentions.context_snippet: The first ingredient, knowledge and pre-training, is what fueled the original ChatGPT moment in 2022.

mentions.quoted_text: The second, reasoning and inference-time compute, came with the release of O1 in late 2024.
mentions.context_snippet: The second, reasoning and inference-time compute, came with the release of O1 in late 2024.

mentions.quoted_text: The third, iteration and long-horizon agents, came in the last few weeks with Cloud Code and other coding agents crossing a capability threshold.
mentions.context_snippet: The third, iteration and long-horizon agents, came in the last few weeks with Cloud Code and other coding agents crossing a capability threshold.

mentions.quoted_text: You can hire GPT 5.2 or Claude or Grock or Gemini today.
mentions.context_snippet: So what? Well, soon, they say, you'll be able to hire an agent. Which, with a hat-tip to Sarah Guo, they call one litmus test for AGI. You can hire GPT 5.2 or Claude or Grock or Gemini today.

mentions.quoted_text: When GPT-3 first came out, the primary use case for AI was the GitHub Copilot.
mentions.context_snippet: When GPT-3 first came out, the primary use case for AI was the GitHub Copilot. The best it could do was complete the line of code you were already writing.
